name: Cadence Capital Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$0.7535. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$0.7535, stop A$0.7128, target A$0.7750. Risk/reward is 0.53:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
